_comment: Roster for site/build_benchmark.py. The NUMBERS come from the grade artifacts; this file only controls display. 'ingest' = grade cards merged (newest wins) into the cumulative 'store'. 'demo' = the curated public table (the tasks on rollouts.html); each entry is scored (has 'run' = a graded run id), 'status':'ungraded' (blank row, flagged in the name cell), or 'note' (a reference/anchor row). Every graded run also appears in 'Complete list' automatically; 'complete_labels'/'complete_order' set its sub-label and position, and 'complete_extra' adds outcome-only / reference rows that have no full grade.

demo.name: Golden path
demo.note: Reference, not scored. Defines the map-quality ceiling (1.0) at ≈3.15 Å.

demo.name: Performance floor
demo.note: Reference, not scored. Defines the map-quality floor (0.0) at ≈4.35 Å; map similarity 0.038.

complete_labels.e2e_easy: constrained tools · predefined surface (off public site)
complete_labels.e2e_hard: constrained tools · predefined surface (off public site)

complete_extra.name: floor_min
complete_extra.note: Reference, not scored. Defines the map-quality floor (0.0) at ≈4.35 Å; map similarity 0.038.
